font.span: Upload devcontainer image or feature source.zip archive to Amazon S3.
Amazon EventBridge receives Object Created event and starts the pipeline.
AWS CodePipeline builds a multi-architecture container image using AWS Graviton.
The devcontainer image is started and tested.
AWS CodeBuild pushes to Amazon ECR
